USA: My mayor was once a cat. True story.
GBR: I have a law about letting strangers use your loo.
FRA: I invented the handshake kiss. De rien!
DEU: I brew over 1,500 kinds of beer. Prost!
ITA: I'm shaped like a boot. And I invented pizza.
ESP: I nap every afternoon. It's called a siesta.
JPN: I have a mountain so perfect, people call it sacred.
CHN: My wall is so long, it took 2,000 years to build.
IND: Over 1,600 languages are spoken inside me.
BRA: I hold the Amazon — the lungs of the Earth.
CAN: I'm the second largest country on Earth. Really!
AUS: I have more kangaroos than people. Way more.
RUS: I'm so wide, I span 11 time zones.
KOR: I have the fastest internet in the world.
ARG: I invented the tango. Now I can't stop dancing.
NGA: Can you guess how many languages I speak? Over 500!
EGY: My pyramids are older than you can imagine.
ZAF: I have three capital cities. Yes, three!
KEN: I'm home to the world's fastest long-distance runners.
TUR: I'm the only country that sits on two continents.
GRC: I invented democracy, theater, AND the Olympics.
THA: I'm the only SE Asian country never colonized.
VNM: I'm shaped like a dragon flying south.
IDN: I'm made of 17,000 islands. Can you count them?
PHL: I have 7,641 islands. Can you beat that?
COL: I touch two oceans at the very same time!
PER: I'm home to Machu Picchu AND the Amazon's source.
CHL: I'm the longest, thinnest country in the world.
IRN: Did you know I invented ice cream? In a desert!
IRQ: I'm where humans first learned to read and write.
SAU: I sit above the world's largest oil reserves.
ARE: I built the world's tallest building.
ISR: I hold the lowest point on Earth's surface.
PAK: I'm home to K2 — the second tallest mountain on Earth.
BGD: I'm one of the most densely packed nations alive.
MMR: I have over 1,000 ancient Buddhist temples.
POL: I'm where Marie Curie and Chopin were born.
UKR: My sunflower fields stretch beyond the horizon.
ROU: I'm home to Dracula's real-life castle.
NOR: The Northern Lights dance above me in winter.
SWE: IKEA and ABBA? Both born inside me!
FIN: I have 188,000 lakes — more than anywhere else.
NLD: I'm so flat, I built windmills just to stay dry.
BEL: I invented french fries. Not France — ME!
CHE: My mountains hide the world's best chocolate.
AUT: Mozart was born here. Music runs in my veins.
PRT: I sent the first explorers to map the whole world.
IRL: Zero snakes here — St. Patrick banished them all!
PRY: Did you know I'm hiding the world's largest dam?
SVK: I have more castles per km than almost anywhere.
MLT: I'm one of the smallest, yet most ancient nations.
